  <entry>

    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://status.claude.com/incidents/rvb96c56gn6k"/>
    <title>Degraded performance for Claude Code on the web, Cowork Remote, Claude Tag, and Claude Code Review sessions</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 8</var>, <var data-var='time'>21:04</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Resolved</strong> - This issue has been resolved. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 8</var>, <var data-var='time'>19:41</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Monitoring</strong> - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 8</var>, <var data-var='time'>19:07</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Investigating</strong> - We are currently investigating a performance issue affecting features such as Claude Code on the Web (claude.ai/code), Claude Code Review, Cowork Remote, Claude Tag, and document creation in claude.ai. Our team is working on mitigating this issue. </p></content>
  </entry>

    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 8</var>, <var data-var='time'>21:04</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Resolved</strong> - This issue has been resolved.
